summary: Led CI/CD pipeline improvements, refactored outdated components, and integrated AI capabilities into the product. Designed team-wide development standards for a distributed team of 19 engineers across Mexico and India, enabling seamless code integration and a more stable development workflow.
Developed new features, reviewed code in PRs, and resolved bugs within an active product team. Maintained high technical standards while collaborating closely with a co-located team in India.
Migrated a legacy PHP application to Oracle JET, an in-house Oracle framework built on JavaScript with a reactive architecture using Knockout.js. Full-stack work across Node.js and MySQL.

Maintained and developed features for CTS (Container Terminal System), a management system for a maritime container terminal. Bridged yard logistics with administrative and billing processes. Responsible for PL/SQL script maintenance and Oracle Forms development.
Feature development and bug fixing on a legacy PHP system. Contributed to the evolution of the company's internal CRM, working with Entity Framework, database migrations, and Azure deployments.
Built custom projects with direct client contact. Gathered requirements, made technical decisions, and delivered complete products end to end.
Collaborated on internal university projects. First formal work experience, with direct contact with end users, technical documentation, and team collaboration.
